name: PIMCO 0-5 Year High Yield Corporate Bond Index ETF (Ondo Tokenized)
description: HYSon is the Ondo Tokenized version of the PIMCO 0-5 Year High Yield Corporate Bond Index ETF, giving tokenholders economic exposure similar to holding HYS and reinvesting any dividends. Additional restrictions apply. Learn more at https://ondo.finance/gm.
